temporal_description: The audio begins with the loud, insistent, and high-pitched beeping of a ringing mobile phone. The video opens with a medium shot of a man in a light blue, collared shirt, possibly a work uniform. He is in a dimly lit, cool-toned environment, possibly an office or a warehouse, with shelves and indistinct items in the blurred background. He is looking down, focused on something in his hands. In the top left corner, there is a watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网". The camera is slightly shaky, suggesting a handheld perspective. The man turns his back to the camera and begins to walk away. The camera follows him, maintaining a medium shot. The background remains out of focus, showing the same dim, industrial-looking space. The "风行网" watermark is still visible. The man brings a silver flip phone to his ear, answering the call. The camera angle shifts to a close-up profile of the man as he speaks into the phone. His expression is serious and focused. The lighting is low and moody, casting shadows on his face. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top left corner. A man answers the call with a calm and direct "喂" (wèi), a common way to answer a phone in Chinese. He then responds with a short, slightly questioning "啊?" (a?), as if seeking confirmation or more information. The background is quiet, with no other music or significant sound effects, placing all the focus on the phone conversation.
